step_rationale: Encodes GPIIb/IIIa β-subunit; mediates platelet aggregation and arrest during thrombus formation.
mechanism: ITGB3 gene product (integrin β3) forms the fibrinogen receptor αIIbβ3, essential for platelet-platelet adhesion and thrombus consolidation.
